title: JavaScript Loop Control Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating robust and cross-browser web experiences with loops and repetition.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional-grade web application in JavaScript for repeating an action for every item in an Array?
Which keyword is used to IMMEDIATELY stop a loop entirely, even if the condition is still true?
Which keyword is used to skip only the CURRENT repetition and move straight to the next one in the loop?
What happens if a loop's condition is ALWAYS true and it never finishes (an 'Infinite Loop')?
options: The site will load much faster.
The browser will likely 'freeze' or crash because it is stuck repeating the action forever.
It will choose the colors for the animation.
It will automatically generate CSS animations.

questions.question: The 'for' loop in JavaScript allows you to define three things. Which of these is NOT one of those three things?
options: Which font to use for the loop.
